title: Maps, Strings, Bytes, Runes, Unicode, and Deterministic Results · Language Lens: String Bytes Immutability
summary: An incident summarizer must count labels, normalize text, preserve UTF-8, and publish stable output despite unordered maps. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go string bytes immutability increment in a Unicode-safe deterministic incident summarizer. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Treat strings as immutable byte sequences and convert to or from byte slices with explicit allocation and encoding intent.
Choose comparable key types and explain map reference behavior, iteration instability, mutation rules, and concurrency limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
